review: St. Mary's Mexican Food reminds of Nico's taco shop in a lot ways. The food, at least what we ordered, is on par with a fast food taco joint. It's fast and cheap, but not the greatest, in my opinion. I have not tried some of their signature items like the menudo and red chile. Out order was two tostadas, carne seca burro and a breakfast burrito (bacon, egg , potato, cheese). They were a-ok. The highlight of the breakfast burrito is that the potatoes are finely diced. I wish more places would do it that way! The line was a little long but moved fast. However, that's not always the case. You can call for pick up and that's highly recommended.
